channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: 49ers’ Brock, Purdy, Chicago’s Caleb Williams take divergent routes as franchise quarterbacks
item.description: Their routes couldn't have been more different, but the 49ers' Brock Purdy and Chicago's Caleb Williams are learning through adversity in 2024.
item.dc:creator: Jerry McDonald, The Mercury News

item.title: 12-team College Football Playoff bracket offers a new, imperfect way of picking a national champion
item.description: Over the decades, no sport has had more issues figuring out its national champion than major college football. Spoiler alert: The newly expanded 12-team playoff bracket that will be announced Sunday is not the perfect fix.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: No. 18 Clemson beats No. 8 SMU 34-31 on last-second field goal for ACC title, berth in the CFP
item.description: CHARLOTTE, N.C. (AP) — Cade Klubnik sat in his car for more than hour last Saturday crying following Clemson's loss to rival South Carolina, figuring his team's chances of reaching the College Football Playoff were over. My how things can change.
item.dc:creator: STEVE REED, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: No. 1 Oregon outlasts No. 3 Penn State 45-37 for Big Ten title and 1st-round bye in playoffs
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — No. 1 Oregon managed to navigate all the potential pitfalls of a topsy-turvy college football season — even on a wild, wacky championship weekend. It just took the Ducks a little longer than expected to keep their biggest goals intact.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL MAROT, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: College Football Playoff preview: Clemson’s win sets up controversy with Alabama, SMU dueling for the final spot
item.description: Clemson put the College Football Playoff selection committee in a bad spot with its victory in the ACC championship game.
item.dc:creator: Jon Wilner, The Mercury News

item.title: Arizona State makes College Football Playoff with 45-19 win over Iowa State in Big 12 title game
item.description: ARLINGTON, Texas (AP) — Cam Skattebo and Arizona State are on quite a run in their Big 12 debut after being the preseason pick to finish at the bottom of the conference.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Baltimore Orioles reach $49.5M, 3-year deal with OF Tyler O'Neill, AP source says
item.description: The Baltimore Orioles have agreed to a $49.5 million, three-year contract with outfielder Tyler O'Neill, according to a person familiar with the negotiations. The person spoke to The Associated Press on Saturday on condition of anonymity because the agreement was subject to a successful physical.
item.dc:creator: NOAH TRISTER, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Utes drop first home game to St. Mary's, 72-63
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Runnin' Utes had won its first six home games by an average margin of 32 points. But they hadn't played a team as talented as Saint Mary's. The Gaels came into the Huntsman Center Saturday, and led by Paulius Murauskas, beat the utes, 72-63.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Oregon, Penn State amass 55 points to set Big Ten title game 1st-half scoring record
item.description: Oregon and Penn State piled up seven touchdowns, 537 yards, 28 first downs and 55 points in the Big Ten title game.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Heisman hopeful Ashton Jeanty points to his faith after playoff-bound Boise State wins Mountain West title
item.description: Boise State star Ashton Jeanty spoke about his faith after the Broncos secured their place in the College Football Playoffs with a win over UNLV in the Mountain West tile game on Friday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Kentucky bettor places $3.1 million wager on Eagles to beat improving Panthers
item.description: A Kentucky bettor has placed a massive wager on the Philadelphia Eagles to beat the Carolina Panthers, who are on the rise after back-to-back three-point losses.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Chicago hosts conference rival Philadelphia
item.description: Philadelphia 76ers (6-15, 13th in the Eastern Conference) vs. Chicago Bulls (10-14, 10th in the Eastern Conference) Chicago; Sunday, 1 p.m. EST BOTTOM LINE: Nikola Vucevic and the Chicago Bulls take on Tyrese Maxey and the Philadelphia 76ers on Sunday. The Bulls are 8-7 in Eastern Conference games.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: School district mired in transgender athlete controversy tells critics to blame lawmakers in CA and DC
item.description: Martin Luther King Jr. High School addressed an ongoing controversy over a transgender athlete and shifted blame to California state government and the federal government.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Former White Sox player, analyst Bill Melton dies at 79
item.description: CHICAGO — "Beltin'" Bill Melton has died at the age of 79. According to a press release from the team, Melton died early Thursday morning in Phoenix after complications from a brief illness.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, WGN 9

item.title: Utah State announces 2025 signing class
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Utah State interim head football coach Nate Dreiling announced portions of USU’s signing class on Wednesday, as part of the NCAA Early Signing Day. The class, which includes 20 total players, is comprised of 17 high school athletes and three junior college transfers.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Illinois Football assistant coach dies at age 62
item.description: CHAMPAIGN, Ill. (WCIA) -- Dana Dimel, the Senior Offensive Assistant for the Illinois Fighting Illini football team, has died. Illinois Athletics announced that the longtime coach passed away Tuesday at the age of 62. He is survived by his wife Julie and their children Winston and Joey.
item.dc:creator: Bradley Zimmerman, WGN 9

item.title: BYU runners use olive oil to win NCAA championship
item.description: The school's coach said his runners used “an old-school running trick” by rubbing olive oil on their legs to keep themselves warm.
item.dc:creator: Liz Jassin, NewsNation

item.title: Matthews scores first goal since return from injury, Maple Leafs beat Blackhawks 4-1
item.description: Auston Matthews scored his first goal since returning from injury as the Toronto Maple Leafs defeated the Chicago Blackhawks 4-1 on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: McCaffrey injury potentially rules him out for rest of season
item.description: ORCHARD PARK, N.Y. (AP) — San Francisco running back Christian McCaffrey suffered a knee injury that coach Kyle Shanahan described as “potentially” season-ending in the 49ers’ 35-10 loss to the Buffalo Bills on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, KRON4

item.title: Monahan with goal and assist, Blue Jackets extend points streak to 6 with 6-3 win over Blackhawks
item.description: Sean Monahan had a goal and assist, and the Columbus Blue Jackets extended their points streak to six games with a 6-3 win over the Chicago Blackhawks on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9
